meta-description: Learn about out-of-pocket costs by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Out-of-pocket costs
excerpt: Costs you pay when you get a service covered by your plan (like deductibles, co-pays, and coinsurance) plus all costs for any items not covered by your plan
content:
Your expenses for medical care that aren't reimbursed by insurance. Out-of-pocket costs include deductibles, coinsurance, and copayments for covered services plus all costs for services that aren't covered.

  • How to choose Marketplace insurance: Out-of-pocket costs
